title: Follow Up on Bulk Emails / Reselect Leads from Bulk Email
excerpt: Allow users to reselect leads from sent bulk emails to follow up with. The bulk email tool is much more functional than the sequences tool, so it’d be handy to be able to follow up with leads on these lists rather than d…

posts.author: caylashank (Cayla)
posts.cookedHtml: Allow users to reselect leads from sent bulk emails to follow up with. The bulk email tool is much more functional than the sequences tool, so it’d be handy to be able to follow up with leads on these lists rather than deal with the current limitations of the sequences
